text: 🇪🇺 Kaja Khallas lied in her original tweet, claiming that Hezbollah had agreed to disarm, and then edited it. The EU’s most embarrassing official strikes again. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu’s court trials are set to resume on Sunday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡的法庭审判定于周日恢复。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 Two Zionist brutally beating a Palestinian man in the village of Qawawis, Masafer Yatta, in the southern West Bank

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli security services have arrested a 22‑year‑old Haifa resident, Ami Gaidrov, on suspicion of espionage for Iran and attempting to assassinate former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett by producing explosives. Gaidrov allegdly was in contact with an Iranian handler from August 2025, carried out multiple tasks for large sums of money, and manufactured explosives intended for the attack. He rented an apartment in Haifa, documented the process and sent footage to his handler. He also took photos of Haifa port and missile impact sites in the north, and was asked to find a rental property overlooking the port to install a permanent camera. He received over 70,000 shekels, mostly via digital wallets. Several other Israeli citizens have been arrested for assisting him. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列安全部门逮捕了一名22岁的海法居民阿米·盖德罗夫，其涉嫌为伊朗从事间谍活动，并试图通过制作爆炸物刺杀以色列前总理纳夫塔利·贝内特。据称，盖德罗夫自2025年8月起与一名伊朗接头人联系，为获取高额报酬执行了多项任务，并制造了用于袭击的爆炸物。他在海法租下一间公寓，记录了整个过程并将视频发送给接头人。他还拍摄了海法港口及北部导弹袭击地点的照片，并被要求寻找能俯瞰港口的出租物业以安装永久摄像头。他通过数字钱包收取了超过7万谢克尔。另有数名以色列公民因协助他而被捕。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇾 Massad Boulos said he held a call with General Saddam Khalifa Haftar, discussing Libya’s progress toward a unified national budget and its role in hosting part of AFRICOM’s Flintlock 26 exercise. They also addressed issues related to security coordination, regional stability, and longer-term prospects for cooperation and development. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇾 马萨德·布洛斯表示，他与萨达姆·哈利法·哈夫塔尔将军进行了通话，讨论了利比亚在统一国家预算方面的进展及其在主办非洲司令部“燧石枪26”部分演习中的作用。双方还就安全协调、地区稳定以及长期合作与发展前景等问题交换了意见。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 IDF Spokesperson shares details of the eliminated targets during yesterday’s airstrikes in Lebanon: The IDF attacked and eliminated yesterday Ali Yosef Harshi, the personal secretary of the Secretary-General of the terrorist organization Hezbollah…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said Israel continues to strike Hezbollah with force, precision and determination. In Beiru, he stated that the IDF killed Ali Youssef Harashi, the personal secretary of Hezbollah Secretary‑General Naim Qassem and one of his closest associates. “Our message is clear: whoever acts against Israeli citizens will be hit. We will continue to strike Hezbollah wherever necessary until we restore full security to the northern residents.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列国防军发言人分享了昨日在黎巴嫩空袭中清除目标的具体细节：以军昨日袭击并清除了恐怖组织真主党总书记的个人秘书阿里·约瑟夫·哈尔希……”⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将继续以强力、精准和决心打击真主党。在贝鲁特，他称以军击毙了真主党总书记纳伊姆·卡西姆的个人秘书阿里·优素福·哈拉希，此人也是卡西姆最亲密的助手之一。“我们的信息很明确：任何针对以色列公民的行动都将遭到打击。我们将继续在必要的地方打击真主党，直至为北部居民恢复全面安全。”@wfwitness

text: 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 ⚡️ Starmer Touches Down in Abu Dhabi for Urgent Hormuz Reopening Talks
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 斯塔默抵达阿布扎比，就紧急重启霍尔木兹海峡进行会谈

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Putin "has not made any decisions about an Easter truce as of today," Peskov stated. Zelensky previously proposed declaring a truce for Easter. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 佩斯科夫表示，普京“截至目前尚未就复活节停火做出任何决定”。泽连斯基此前曾提议在复活节期间宣布停火。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰An Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad this evening for talks with the US, Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam reported. 🔴@DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The authorities in Islamabad have blocked the city's main roads ahead of the arrival of US and Iranian delegations, reports a TASS correspondent. All entrances to the Serena Hotel, where the delegations are scheduled to be accommodated, are closed. This area is under special control by security forces. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆报告，一个伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。🔴@DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告”🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据塔斯社记者报道，伊斯兰堡当局在美国和伊朗代表团抵达前封锁了该市的主要道路。代表团计划下榻的塞雷纳酒店所有入口均已关闭，该区域处于安全部队的特别管控之下。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "sirens in the upper Gallie" Impact in open areas
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“上加利利地区的警报声”在开阔地带的影响

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: Commander of Iran’s Quds Force Ismail Qaani, successor to Qasem Soleimani, has been absent from public view since the 17th of February. Israeli speculation that he may be a “Mossad agent” is dismissed; instead, Israeli security sources suggest Israel may not see him as a priority target because he has been far less effective than Soleimani. Under Qaani, Iran’s proxy axis has collapsed: Hezbollah lost its leadership and firepower, the Assad government fell, and pro‑Iranian militias in Iraq have lost influence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：伊朗圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼，作为卡西姆·苏莱曼尼的继任者，自2月17日起未公开露面。以色列猜测他可能是“摩萨德特工”的说法被否定；相反，以色列安全消息人士暗示，以色列可能不视他为优先目标，因为其效能远不及苏莱曼尼。在卡尼领导下，伊朗的代理轴心已崩溃：真主党失去领导力和火力，阿萨德政府倒台，伊拉克的亲伊朗民兵影响力减弱。@wfwitness

text: sirens in the upper Gallie
text_zh: 上加利利地区的警报声

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran’s police commander Ahmad-Reza Radan said that after 40 days of "aggression," US‑Israeli enemies were "forced" to accept Iran’s declared conditions. The "resistance of the armed forces," the presence of the Iranian people on the scene, and the "guidance of the Supreme Leader" led the "aggressors" to retreat in the face of the nation’s will. While calm has returned, police forces remain on high alert. Any further hostile act will be met with a decisive, swift and instructive response. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗警察指挥官艾哈迈德-礼萨·拉丹表示，经过40天的“侵略”，美以敌人“被迫”接受伊朗提出的条件。“武装部队的抵抗”、伊朗人民在现场的存在以及“最高领袖的指导”导致“侵略者”在国家意志面前退缩。尽管局势恢复平静，警察部队仍保持高度警戒。任何进一步的敌对行为都将遭到果断、迅速且具有指导性的回应。@wfwitness

text: Israeli Politicians Grill Netanyahu for "Disasterous" Ceasefire Netanyahu is facing a strong backlash at home over the ceasefire "Israel was shut out of", as delierate Israeli strikes on Lebanon risk provoking Iran into response, potentially collapsing the ceasefire. U.S. commentators accuse Israel of trying to sabotage Trumps peace deal. READ MORE
text_zh: 以色列政客因“灾难性”停火协议质询内塔尼亚胡 内塔尼亚胡因“以色列被排除在外”的停火协议在国内面临强烈反弹，以色列对黎巴嫩的蓄意袭击可能引发伊朗回应，导致停火协议崩溃。美国评论员指责以色列试图破坏特朗普的和平协议。阅读更多

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇸🇾 Al Jadeed reports that intensive contacts led by the Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam, in coordination with the Syrian presidency and with Arab, regional, and international mediators, have resulted in Israel backing down from targeting the Masnaa…" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Arabiya : The Jdeidet Yabous border crossing with Lebanon (known as the Masnaa crossing) has reopened after the threat that prompted its temporary closure “has passed”. The crossing had been shut following Israeli threats to strike it over alleged Hezbollah use, which both Beirut and Damascus denied. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇸🇾 Al Jadeed报道，由黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆主导的密集接触，在叙利亚总统府协调下，并与阿拉伯、地区及国际调解人合作，已使以色列放弃针对马斯纳的目标……” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 阿拉比亚电视台：与黎巴嫩接壤的杰代代特亚布斯边境口岸（又称马斯纳口岸）在促使临时关闭的“威胁已过”后重新开放。该口岸此前因以色列威胁袭击而关闭，以方指控真主党使用该口岸，贝鲁特和大马士革均予以否认。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah, in its sixth communiqué of the day, said it targeted Kiryat Shmona for the third time today at 11:30am with a rocket barrage, in response to the "enemy’s violation of the ceasefire." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党在当天的第六份公报中表示，作为对“敌人违反停火协议”的回应，已于今日上午11:30第三次向谢莫纳城发动火箭弹齐射攻击。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted the town of Al‑Mansouri in the Tyre district of southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部提尔地区的曼苏里镇。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Informed Iranian sources said that the Pakistani mediator and other parties are making diplomatic efforts to salvage the ceasefire. Tehran is awaiting an end to attacks on Lebanon and a U.S. commitment to all understandings before starting negotiations. Messages continue to be exchanged between Iran and the U.S. via Pakistan. Tehran has received promises of U.S. action to end the attacks but insists on actual compliance. The coming hours are sensitive and will determine whether Israel commits to a ceasefire in Lebanon. Iran is determined to respond to ceasefire violations, but the Pakistani mediator has asked for time for his efforts. U.S. statements in recent hours have deepened mistrust and increased Iranian doubts about the viability of negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 《新阿拉伯人报》：知情伊朗消息人士称，巴基斯坦调解方及其他各方正进行外交努力以挽救停火协议。德黑兰在启动谈判前，正等待对黎巴嫩袭击的结束及美国对所有谅解事项的承诺。伊朗与美国通过巴基斯坦持续交换信息。德黑兰已收到美国将采取行动停止袭击的承诺，但坚持要求实际履约。未来数小时十分关键，将决定以色列是否承诺在黎巴嫩停火。伊朗决心对违反停火行为作出回应，但巴基斯坦调解方请求给予其斡旋时间。美国近期的声明加深了不信任，加剧了伊朗对谈判可行性的疑虑。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: Israel will strike Hezbollah wherever necessary.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：以色列将在任何必要的地方打击真主党。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army announced that four Lebanese soldiers were killed as a result of Israeli strikes yesterday in Sidon, Shmistar and Hermel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队宣布，四名黎巴嫩士兵因以色列昨日在赛达、什米斯塔尔和赫尔梅勒的袭击而丧生。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 French foreign minister Jean-Noël Barrot strongly condemned Israeli strikes on Lebanon and said that destroying the Lebanese state will not destroy Hezbollah – on the contrary, it will strengthen the group. He added that Lebanon should not be a scapegoat for a government upset that a ceasefire was reached between Washington and Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗强烈谴责以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击，并表示摧毁黎巴嫩国家并不会消灭真主党——相反，这将强化该组织。他补充说，黎巴嫩不应成为某些政府因华盛顿与德黑兰达成停火协议而恼怒的替罪羊。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al-Akhbar: Iraq has entered a phase of cautious waiting after the US‑Iran ceasefire, with milita factions maintaining a state of permanent alert. An estimated 117‑120 people were killed in the conflict, including civilians, security forces, Popular Mobilisation Forces and Peshmerga. Economic losses are estimated at $6‑10 billion due to halted oil exports and closed airspace. A faction leader said there is no trust in U.S. President Trump and that “our fingers are on the trigger.' The Iranian consulate in Basra stated that Iran does not need foreign volunteers, as it already has over 14 million volunteers inside the country, but expressed appreciation for Iraqi solidarity. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿拉克巴尔报：美伊停火后，伊拉克进入谨慎观望阶段，民兵派系保持永久警戒状态。冲突中估计有117至120人丧生，包括平民、安全部队、人民动员力量和佩什梅格。因石油出口暂停和领空关闭，经济损失估计达60至100亿美元。一位派系领导人表示不信任美国总统特朗普，并称'我们的手指已扣在扳机上'。伊朗驻巴士拉领事馆称伊朗不需要外国志愿者，国内已有超过1400万志愿者，但对伊拉克的团结表示赞赏。@wfwitness

text: BREAKING: The Trump administration is expected to keep easing sanctions on Russian oil, and likely Iranian oil soon, to help stabilize global supply and keep fuel prices from rising further. Source: Semafor
text_zh: 突发：特朗普政府预计将继续放松对俄罗斯石油的制裁，并可能很快对伊朗石油采取类似措施，以帮助稳定全球供应并防止燃料价格进一步上涨。消息来源：Semafor

text: American Journalist Abby Martin: You see Israel buying up media outlets. You see Israeli billionaires trying to tamp down the narrative. They’re desperate. They’re desperate because they know that the only way they’ll survive is to try to convince the world of the opposite of what we’re all seeing. But it’s too late. We’re never going to forget what it looks like when Palestinians hold their children in plastic bags. No one can forget that. I’m never going to forget the sound of a drone emitting a crying baby so it can lure children out of their homes and massacre them — like a cat and mouse. No one’s going to forget that. No one’s going to forget what Gaza looks like today. You can’t wash that away. You can’t paper over that with degenerate, base-level propaganda lies.
text_zh: 美国记者艾比·马丁：你看到以色列在收购媒体。你看到以色列亿万富翁试图压制舆论。他们很绝望。他们绝望是因为他们知道，他们生存的唯一方式就是试图让世界相信与我们所见相反的事实。但为时已晚。我们永远不会忘记巴勒斯坦人用塑料袋装着自己孩子的景象。没人能忘记。我永远不会忘记无人机发出婴儿哭声以引诱儿童离开家园并屠杀他们的声音——就像猫捉老鼠。没人会忘记。没人会忘记加沙今天的样子。你无法洗刷这一切。你不能用堕落、低级的宣传谎言来掩盖。

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s ambassador to Russia, Kazem Jalali, said Tehran is ready for negotiations but they must yield tangible results and lasting peace. He noted that the U.S. initially claimed it would topple the "Iranian regime" but failed, and that trust between Iran and the U.S. is insufficient because American officials do not keep their commitments. Jalali added that Iran has never sought to close the Strait of Hormuz but aims to establish a legal framework for it, which should be determined by the littoral states (Iran and Oman). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗驻俄罗斯大使卡齐姆·贾拉利表示，德黑兰已准备好谈判，但谈判必须产生切实成果和持久和平。他指出，美国最初声称要推翻'伊朗政权'但失败了，并且伊朗与美国之间的信任不足，因为美国官员不遵守承诺。贾拉利补充说，伊朗从未试图关闭霍尔木兹海峡，而是旨在为其建立法律框架，这应由沿岸国家（伊朗和阿曼）决定。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Qatari Emir Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, in a phone call with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, expressed his country's readiness to help stop the military escalation in Lebanon. He voiced solidarity with Lebanon during these difficult circumstances and affirmed that he is seeking to include Lebanon in the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 卡塔尔埃米尔塔米姆·本·哈马德·阿勒萨尼在与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩的电话中表示，该国已准备好帮助停止黎巴嫩的军事升级。他在这困难时期声援黎巴嫩，并确认正寻求将黎巴嫩纳入美国和伊朗之间的停火协议。@wfwitness

text: American Journalist Abby Martin on her visit to Israel: I was so horrified and alarmed… I felt like I was walking into Berlin in 1932. I just couldn’t believe what I was hearing. There’s no hope from within Israeli society. It’s an ethnostate… built on supremacy. That’s what Zionism is.
text_zh: 美国记者艾比·马丁谈其访问以色列：我感到如此恐惧和震惊……感觉就像走进了1932年的柏林。我简直不敢相信我所听到的。以色列社会内部没有希望。这是一个建立在种族优越之上的民族国家……这就是犹太复国主义。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇮🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧 The European Union’s foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas said the ceasefire with Iran must be expanded to include Lebanon. She also stated that Hezbollah must fulfil its commitment to disarm. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 European Union’s foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas said Israel’s right to self‑defence does not justify the massive destruction in Lebanon, and that Israel’s excessive measures do not fall within the scope of self‑defence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇪🇺🇮🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧 欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯表示，与伊朗的停火必须扩展至黎巴嫩。她还声明，真主党必须履行其解除武装的承诺。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯称，以色列的自卫权并不能为黎巴嫩遭受的大规模破坏辩护，且以色列的过度措施已超出自卫范畴。@wfwitness

text: American Journalist Abby Martin on her visit to Israel: The whole world has to isolate this rogue… state. Shame anyone who goes there. You cannot expect change in a society this far gone. We’re seeing essentially the fourth Reich today marching forward.
text_zh: 美国记者艾比·马丁谈其访问以色列：全世界必须孤立这个流氓…国家。任何前往那里的人都应感到羞耻。你无法期望一个已如此沉沦的社会发生改变。我们今天目睹的实质上是第四帝国在向前推进。

text: 🇮🇷 💬 Opponents of Iran will never achieve the cessation of uranium enrichment by Tehran - the Head of the Atomic Energy Organization of the Islamic Republic Mohammad Eslami. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💬 伊朗的反对者永远不会实现德黑兰停止铀浓缩——伊斯兰共和国原子能组织负责人穆罕默德·埃斯拉米。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 Handala hacking group hacked the phone of a former IDF Chief Herzi Halevi Among the leaked materials is a video showing a secret visit to Jordan where Halevi presented a dagger from a Jordanian soldier killed in 1967 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 Handala黑客组织入侵了以色列国防军前参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机 泄露材料中包含一段视频，显示其秘密访问约旦，期间哈勒维展示了一把来自1967年被杀的约旦士兵的匕首 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇯🇴 🇶🇦 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Handala hacked former IOF Chief Herzi Halevi’s phone and released photos/videos. The leaks show a secret Jordan and Qatar visit where Halevi, in civilian clothes, presented a dagger from a Jordanian soldier killed in 1967.
text_zh: 🇯🇴 🇶🇦 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Handala黑客组织入侵了以色列国防军前参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机并发布了照片/视频。泄露内容显示了一次秘密的约旦和卡塔尔访问，哈勒维身着便装，展示了一把来自1967年被杀的约旦士兵的匕首。

text: Hezbollah shows footage claiming it targeted an Israeli Navy vessel with Noor anti-ship cruise missiles.
text_zh: 真主党发布视频，宣称使用努尔反舰巡航导弹瞄准了一艘以色列海军舰艇。

text: Iran-linked hacking group Handala hacked former IDF Chief Herzi Halevi’s phone and released photos/videos. The leaks show a secret Jordan visit where Halevi, in civilian clothes, presented a dagger from a Jordanian soldier killed in 1967. Other personal and sensitive materials were also shared online.
text_zh: 伊朗关联黑客组织Handala入侵前以色列国防军总参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机并发布照片/视频。泄露内容显示一次秘密约旦之行，哈勒维身着便装，展示一把来自1967年阵亡的约旦士兵的匕首。其他个人敏感材料亦被公开于网络。

text: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Reuters initially claimed Israeli forces had martyred Hezbollah Sheikh Naim Qassem, but quickly corrected it: the martyred individual was his nephew and personal secretary, Ali Yusuf Harshi.
text_zh: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 路透社最初宣称以色列部队使真主党谢赫纳伊姆·卡西姆殉难，但迅速更正：殉难者是其侄儿兼私人秘书阿里·优素福·哈尔希。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Hypocrite Emirates strikes again, ‘Strongest Condemnation’ for Israeli Consulate shooting . Dead silence while Israel drops hundreds dead in Lebanon.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench镜像 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 伪善阿联酋再次出击，对以色列领事馆枪击事件表示'最强烈谴责'。以色列在黎巴嫩造成数百人死亡时却一片死寂。

text: Australia's Prime Minister Anthony Albanese: The Australian government also firmly believes that the ceasefire has to apply to Lebanon as well.
text_zh: 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯：澳大利亚政府同样坚信停火协议必须适用于黎巴嫩。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Zionist occupation forces unleashed at least 137 strikes in 30 minutes (~100 strikes in the first 10 minutes) on Wednesday, continuing into Thursday. The savage assault hit 68 locations by jets, 14 towns by drones, and 18 villages by artillery in southern Lebanon. Thursday targets : Khiam (twice), Zrarieh, Bint Jbeil villages (Jmaijmeh, Ghandourieh, Safad al-Battikh, Kafra, Deir Antar), Majdal Selm, Tayr Debba, and artillery on Haris. This desperate terror killed at least 254 martyrs and wounded over 1,165 - the deadliest day since hostilities resumed after the November 2024 ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 犹太复国主义占领军周三在30分钟内发动至少137次袭击（前10分钟约100次），并持续至周四。野蛮攻击涵盖黎巴嫩南部68个地点遭战机轰炸、14个城镇遭无人机袭击、18个村庄遭炮击。周四目标：希亚姆（两次）、兹拉里耶、宾特朱拜勒地区村庄（杰迈杰迈、甘杜里耶、萨法德巴提赫、卡夫拉、代尔安塔尔）、马杰达勒塞勒姆、泰尔代巴，以及对哈里斯的炮击。这场绝望的恐怖行径导致至少254人殉难、1165余人受伤——成为2024年11月停火后敌对行动重启以来最致命的一天。

text: CORRECTION: Israel says it killed Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem’s nephew.
text_zh: 更正：以色列宣称其击毙真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆的侄儿。

text: Worker Unions Protest Layoffs & Debt as Senegal Debt Crisis Deepens Hundreds protested rising costs & layoffs in Dakar Wednesday as Senegal faces a $13 billion debt crisis & 132% debt-to-GDP ratio, highlighting pressure on the Sonko-Faye government. READ MORE
text_zh: 工会抗议裁员与债务，塞内加尔债务危机加剧 周三达喀尔数百人抗议成本上涨与裁员，塞内加尔面临130亿美元债务危机及132%的债务与GDP比率，凸显松科-法耶政府压力。阅读更多

text: Iran has released an official map of required shipping routes in the Strait of Hormuz. It shows vessels must travel closer to Iran’s coast, and confirms for the first time that usual routes are now considered dangerous due to the risk of naval mines.
text_zh: 伊朗发布霍尔木兹海峡官方指定航线图。图中显示船只必须更靠近伊朗海岸航行，并首次确认因水雷风险，常规航线现被视为危险区域。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranians across the country mark the 40th day of mourning for Ayatollah Khamenei, the late Leader of the Islamic Revolution.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗全国民众悼念伊斯兰革命已故领袖哈梅内伊逝世四十日。

text: 🇪🇬 🇮🇱 Today is the anniversary of the bombing of Bahr al-Baqar school; where Israeli Phantoms massacred 46 Egyptian children in the classroom on 8 April 1970. This is not a "military error," but part of the Zionist child-killing doctrine to break the will of nations. From Bahr al-Baqar to Minab and Gaza, the killer is the same, only the geography has changed.
text_zh: 🇪🇬 🇮🇱 今日是巴赫尔巴卡尔学校轰炸事件周年纪念；1970年4月8日，以色列幻影战机在教室中屠杀了46名埃及儿童。这不是‘军事失误’，而是犹太复国主义杀害儿童、瓦解民族意志教条的一部分。从巴赫尔巴卡尔到米纳布和加沙，凶手从未改变，只是地理坐标更替。

text: BIG: Israel’s cabinet secretly approved 34 new settlements in the West Bank, a record expansion passed during the war. This would raise the total number of approved settlements from 69 to 103. The decision was kept classified to avoid U.S. pressure. The IDF raised manpower concerns and suggested a phased rollout, but was overruled. Some settlements will be built inside Palestinian enclaves, and—under a secret clause—water and electricity infrastructure will begin even before land legalization. Source: Inon Yttach
text_zh: 重大：以色列内阁秘密批准约旦河西岸新建34个定居点，创战争期间扩张纪录。此举将使获批定居点总数从69个增至103个。该决定被列为机密以避免美国施压。以色列国防军曾提出人力担忧并建议分阶段推进，但被否决。部分定居点将建于巴勒斯坦飞地内，且根据秘密条款，水电基础设施将在土地合法化前先行建设。消息来源：伊农·尤塔赫

text: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Professor Marandi on rumors that China asked Iran to accept the ceasefire: “I doubt that such a thing is true, because what was important for Iran was for Trump to give up his 15-point plan and to recognize Iran’s 10-point plan.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 马兰迪教授回应中国要求伊朗接受停火传闻：‘我怀疑此事真实性，因为伊朗的核心诉求是特朗普放弃其15点计划并承认伊朗的10点方案。’

text: 🇺🇦 "I'm ready to meet with Putin": Zelensky stated that he does not plan to withdraw troops from Donbass. ➡️ On Donbass: 'We can't just discuss the transfer of Donbass. If we leave it to Russia, they will occupy our most protected positions without losses. Creating new fortified lines could take a year or even a year and a half. They will be able to attack Kharkov and other cities that make a significant contribution to our GDP. And this will lead to a split in society, and any internal division is a key goal of Putin and a threat to our independence.' ➡️ On elections: 'Holding them now contradicts our law. Moreover, we need to ensure the safety of people and soldiers who are supposed to vote. How can this be done during an attack?' ➡️ On Donbass before the war: 'Of course, there were mistakes, everyone makes mistakes. We need to return to the 90s and the early 2000s, but even then, Putin would have found a pretext for an invasion.' ➡️ On Trump: 'Who has better relations with Trump than I do? I think we have a good relationship because I'm one of the few who tell him the truth. Not many people can tell the US president that he's not always right. We need US support not only military, but also the experience we've gained over these years of war, which is also useful to them.' 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 “我已准备好与普京会面”：泽连斯基表示不计划从顿巴斯撤军。➡️ 关于顿巴斯：‘我们不能只讨论顿巴斯的移交。如果将其让给俄罗斯，他们将毫无损失地占领我们最坚固的防御阵地。建立新的防御工事可能需要一年甚至一年半。他们将能够进攻哈尔科夫和其他对我们GDP有重要贡献的城市。这将导致社会分裂，而任何内部分裂都是普京的关键目标，也是对我们独立的威胁。’➡️ 关于选举：‘现在举行选举违反我国法律。此外，我们需要确保民众和士兵在投票时的安全。在遭受攻击时如何做到这一点？’➡️ 关于战前顿巴斯：‘当然，曾有过错误，人人都会犯错。我们需要回溯到90年代和21世纪初，但即便如此，普京也会找到入侵的借口。’➡️ 关于特朗普：‘谁与特朗普的关系比我更好？我认为我们关系良好，因为我是少数敢对他说真话的人之一。没多少人能告诉美国总统他并不总是对的。我们需要美国的支持，不仅是军事上的，还有我们在这些年战争中获得的经验，这对他们也有用。’🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 Spanish Foreign Minister says Spain is reopening its embassy in Tehran.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 西班牙外交部长表示，西班牙将重新开放其在德黑兰的大使馆。
